violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Per PIC, establishment sent the application by mail. Inspector will follow up 1 week after this inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) observed with food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2020

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handle, and /or served and registered with RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2020
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Procedures provided to PIC. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Employee will wash, rinse and sanitize after lunch rush. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked for the burgers. Proper guidance of consumer advisory for raw/uncooked food reviewed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of chef, pasta was cooled down 30 mins piror to this inspection and placed in the sandwich station at 60 degrees Frahneit with plastic wrap covering container. Proper cooling methods reviewed. Chef uncovered pasta and placed pasta in walk-in cooler to allow for rapid cooling during this inspection. -Establishment shall keep a cooling temperature log for cooling process for two weeks. Cooling temperature logs shall be completed and email to inspector for a two-week period. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelving/cabinet in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
Water leakage observed from pipes located in the basement area was not in good repair. Service was contacted at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the high temp. dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for reuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2020
